response.overview: UNFOLDING is a documentary short following Japanese American survivor Mai Mizuno, after the criminal case against USC gynecologist George Tyndall is dismissed following his death. Mai embarks on a journey to nurture healing through reclaiming her voice, cultural reckoning, and ancestral power – in search of a justice the courtroom could never offer.
response.tagline: A Japanese American sexual assault survivor embarks on a healing journey in search of justice a courtroom cannot offer.
response.title: UNFOLDING
